Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.desc: This will be the sixth time that Atlético Madrid and Barcelona have faced each other this season, which is their most meetings in a single campaign since 2013-14. Only in 1985-86 have they faced more than six times in the same season. As well as a 2-0 win in the first leg, Atlético Madrid have also beaten Barcelona 4-0 in the Copa Del Rey this season. They last beat them three times in the same campaign back in 1995-96.

programme.title: PSG: Road to the Ligue 1 Title 2024/25
Real Sociedad vs Alavés - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Real Sociedad have not won any of their last two home games against Alavés in LaLiga and have only once gone three consecutive home matches without a win against the Vitoria side in the top-flight, between 1999 and 2002. Deportivo Alavés have won their last three games against Real Sociedad in LaLiga; they have only managed to win four consecutive matches against three teams in the entire history of the competition: UD Las Palmas in 2001, CD Tenerife in 2002 and Real Valladolid in 2003.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern - QF
programme.desc: 1st Leg

programme.title: Celta de Vigo vs Real Oviedo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Celta de Vigo are unbeaten in their last two LaLiga matches against Real Oviedo, keeping a clean sheet in both. Never in their history have the Galician side recorded three consecutive clean sheets against the Asturian side in the top-flight. Real Oviedo have not won any of their last nine away LaLiga games against Celta de Vigo, losing on their last six visits. This is their worst run of consecutive away defeats against the Vigo team in the competition's history.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Newcastle United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: Having lost their first four Premier League home games against Newcastle between 1994 and 2013, Crystal Palace have lost just one of their last 10 against the Magpies. Following their 2-0 win at St James’ Park in January, Newcastle are looking to complete the Premier League double over Crystal Palace for the first time since 2013-14.

programme.title: PSG: Road to the Ligue 1 Title 2024/25
Sporting vs Arsenal - QF
programme.desc: 1st Leg

programme.title: Athletic Club vs Villarreal - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Athletic Club are unbeaten in their last six LaLiga home games against Villarreal, never going seven consecutive home matches without a defeat against them in the competition. Villarreal CF are unbeaten in their last two LaLiga games against Athletic Club, keeping a clean sheet in both. The Yellow Submarine have never kept three consecutive clean sheets against the Rojiblancos in the top-flight.

programme.title: Elche vs Valencia - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Elche CF have picked up points in three of their last seven LaLiga matches against Valencia, after doing so in just two of their previous 13 top-flight encounters. Valencia CF have won seven of their last nine away LaLiga matches against Elche, after managing just two victories in their first 15 visits to the Franjiverde's home ground in the top-flight.

programme.title: PSG vs Liverpool - QF
programme.desc: 1st Leg

programme.title: UEFA UCL Magazine 2025/2026 - MD13 Review / MD14 Preview
programme.desc: A recap of the best of the action, plus a look forward to the next Match Day in Europe’s premium football competition, the UEFA Champions League. The 2025/26 UEFA Champions League will be the second to be played under the new 36-team league phase. All matches from the UEFA Champions League are live and exclusive only on beIN with a choice of Arabic or English commentary.

programme.title: Paris FC vs Monaco - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Paris FC have lost two of their three home matches against Monaco in all competitions, with their last home game against ASM being their heaviest ever home defeat in Ligue 1. Paris FC are unbeaten in Ligue 1 since Antoine Kombouaré took charge, picking up nine points in five matches, as many as in the last 12 under Stéphane Gilli.

programme.title: Osasuna vs Real Betis - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Osasuna have won just one of their last 15 LaLiga matches against Real Betis, a 3-2 victory in April 2023, suffering as many defeats as in their previous 32 top-flight encounters. Real Betis Balompié have won four of their last five away LaLiga matches against Osasuna, including the last two. The Verdiblancos have never won three consecutive away games against the Rojillos in the competition's history.

programme.title: PSG: Road to the Ligue 1 Title 2024/25
Olympique Marseille vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Marseille have scored 2.4 goals per game against Metz at home in Ligue 1, their highest average against opponents hosted at least 15 times in the top-flight. Only against St Étienne have OM scored more goals at home in Ligue 1. Marseille have taken just 17 points in Ligue 1 this year, fewer than any other team currently in the top half of the table. In 2026, no team has kept fewer clean sheets than OM in the top-flight.

programme.title: Mallorca vs Rayo Vallecano - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Mallorca have not lost any of their 11 home games against Rayo Vallecano in LaLiga, and have not played more home matches without suffering a defeat against any other opponent in their entire top-flight history. Following their 2-1 victory in Vallecas in January 2026, Rayo Vallecano have the chance to complete a league double over Mallorca for the first time in LaLiga history.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Weekly Review - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Each Ligue 1 Match week is condensed into a 52-minute highlights show. Every game, goal, penalty, red card and everything in between is squeezed into an action-packed hour to ensure no football fan misses a kick across the game season.

programme.title: Auxerre vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Auxerre have conceded at least one goal in each of their last 12 matches against Nantes in all competitions, since a 1-0 victory on 1 October 2006 in Ligue 1. Auxerre have picked up 11 points in nine Ligue 1 matches since the start of February, seven more points than Nantes over the same period and only one fewer than they managed in their first 19 matches of the season.

programme.title: Celta de Vigo vs Real Oviedo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Celta de Vigo are unbeaten in their last two LaLiga matches against Real Oviedo, keeping a clean sheet in both. Never in their history have the Galician side recorded three consecutive clean sheets against the Asturian side in the top-flight. Real Oviedo have not won any of their last nine away LaLiga games against Celta de Vigo, losing on their last six visits. This is their worst run of consecutive away defeats against the Vigo team in the competition's history.

programme.title: PSG: Road to the Ligue 1 Title 2024/25
Rennes vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Rennes have scored in each of their 27 home games against Angers in Ligue 1, the highest tally of home games against the same opponent for a team while scoring every time in the division. Rennes have won five of their last seven Ligue 1 matches, with only Monaco and Lille picking up more points than SRFC over the period. Rennes are three points off the podium heading into this MD29, having been 11 points behind third place after MD21 and at the time of Habib Beye's dismissal.

programme.title: Toulouse vs Lille -French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Toulouse have 21 home wins against Lille in Ligue 1, only beating Metz and Rennes more often on home soil in the top-flight. Toulouse are one of four teams, along with Angers, Auxerre and Le Havre, who have not won a match against the current top five Ligue 1 2025-26 sides this season. Toulouse have also lost all three they have played at home in the current campaign.

programme.title: Real Sociedad vs Alavés - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Real Sociedad have not won any of their last two home games against Alavés in LaLiga and have only once gone three consecutive home matches without a win against the Vitoria side in the top-flight, between 1999 and 2002. Deportivo Alavés have won their last three games against Real Sociedad in LaLiga; they have only managed to win four consecutive matches against three teams in the entire history of the competition: UD Las Palmas in 2001, CD Tenerife in 2002 and Real Valladolid in 2003.

programme.desc: Levante UD are unbeaten in their last nine home games against Getafe in LaLiga, keeping a clean sheet in the last four of those ; their best run without conceding at home against a single opponent in their entire top-flight history. programme.title: Olympique Marseille vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Marseille have scored 2.4 goals per game against Metz at home in Ligue 1, their highest average against opponents hosted at least 15 times in the top-flight. Only against St Étienne have OM scored more goals at home in Ligue 1. Marseille have taken just 17 points in Ligue 1 this year, fewer than any other team currently in the top half of the table. In 2026, no team has kept fewer clean sheets than OM in the top-flight.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: FC Barcelona are unbeaten in their last 29 LaLiga matches against Espanyol, their longest unbeaten run against a single opponent and the longest unbeaten run by a team in any derby in the competition's history. RCD Espanyol have not won an away LaLiga match against FC Barcelona since February 2009 under Mauricio Pochettino. Since then, Espanyol have only picked up one point in their following 14 visits to the Camp Nou in the competition : a 1-1 draw in December 2022.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Porto - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have faced Portuguese opposition at home just once in European competition, though that came against Porto when they beat them 2-0 at the City Ground back in October in the league phase of this season’s UEFA Europa League. In their major European history, FC Porto have played 24 away matches in England and have never won. Their only ‘away’ win against an English side was against Chelsea in April 2021 in a UEFA Champions League quarter-final second leg, which was played in Seville due to covid-19 restrictions.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: FC Barcelona are unbeaten in their last 29 LaLiga matches against Espanyol, their longest unbeaten run against a single opponent and the longest unbeaten run by a team in any derby in the competition's history. RCD Espanyol have not won an away LaLiga match against FC Barcelona since February 2009 under Mauricio Pochettino. Since then, Espanyol have only picked up one point in their following 14 visits to the Camp Nou in the competition : a 1-1 draw in December 2022.

programme.title: Auxerre vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29

programme.title: Team - Round 2 - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA

programme.title: SUI v CZE - Doubles - Billie Jean King Cup Qualifiers - 2026 - Switzerland - Swiss Tennis Arena, Bie
programme.desc: Billie Jean King Cup Qualifiers 2026 sees 14 national teams competing in home-and-away ties across two days, with each tie decided by a best-of-five format. programme.title: Real Betis vs Sporting Braga - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: The only previous European meeting between Real Betis and Sporting Braga was in the first leg of this tie, a 1-1 draw, with Betis unbeaten across their last five European games against Portuguese sides. This is the fourth time Braga have visited Spain for a European match – their one win was in a UEFA Champions League qualifier against Sevilla in August 2010, a 4-3 victory. In their other two, they lost 2-0 to Sevilla in November 2006 in the UEFA Cup and 3-0 against Real Madrid in November 2023 in the UEFA Champions League.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: beIN SPORTS, le plus grand des spectacles
Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Barcelona - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: This will be the sixth time that Atlético Madrid and Barcelona have faced each other this season, which is their most meetings in a single campaign since 2013-14. Only in 1985-86 have they faced more than six times in the same season. As well as a 2-0 win in the first leg, Atlético Madrid have also beaten Barcelona 4-0 in the Copa Del Rey this season. They last beat them three times in the same campaign back in 1995-96.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg

Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: Los 100 mejores knockouts de la historia
AZ Alkmaar vs Shakhtar Donetsk - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: Celta Vigo - Freiburg - QF1 - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Celta Vigo have lost each of their last three games against German sides, while this will be the first time they have hosted a Bundesliga side since March 2007 – a 0-1 defeat to Werder Bremen in the UEFA Cup. Spanish teams have won 10 of their last 11 home major European matches against German teams – but the exception was Real Madrid’s 2-1 defeat to Bayern Munich in the UEFA Champions League this month.

programme.title: CONMEBOL Copa Sudamericana
programme.desc: Racing Club vs. Botafogo

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Porto - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have faced Portuguese opposition at home just once in European competition, though that came against Porto when they beat them 2-0 at the City Ground back in October in the league phase of this season’s UEFA Europa League. In their major European history, FC Porto have played 24 away matches in England and have never won. Their only ‘away’ win against an English side was against Chelsea in April 2021 in a UEFA Champions League quarter-final second leg, which was played in Seville due to covid-19 restrictions.

programme.title: Aston Villa - Bologna - QF2 - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Aston Villa have kept five consecutive home clean sheets against Italian clubs in major European competition – the last player to score at Villa Park for an Italian team was Zbigniew Boniek in a 2-1 Juventus win in the European Cup in March 1983. Since beating West Brom 3-1 at the Hawthorns in March 1967, Bologna have lost their five away visits to England in all European competition. They’ve lost to Leeds, Fulham, Liverpool and Aston Villa twice.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.
